nasb.text: Other seed fell on the rocky ground where it did not have much soil; and immediately it sprang up because it had no depth of soil.

esv.text: Other seed fell on rocky ground, where it did not have much soil, and immediately it sprang up, since it had no depth of soil.

cnv.text: 有的落在泥土不多的石地上，因為泥土不深，很快就長起來。

ccb.text: 有些落在石头地上，因为泥土不深，种子很快就发芽了，

csbs.text: 另有落在岩石地上的，那里没有多少泥土，它立刻就发芽了，因为土不深；
